description_long: This object is a large, multi-functional sewing workstation featuring a central sewing machine integrated into a spacious wooden desk with multiple surfaces and storage compartments. The main work area includes a green cutting mat, a white sewing machine, and a serger, with various sewing accessories such as scissors, thread spools, and rulers placed on the tabletop. The workstation is constructed from light-colored wood and is equipped with caster wheels for mobility. Side extensions provide additional workspace and storage, including open shelves and trays for organizing sewing supplies. The overall design is practical and ergonomic, supporting a variety of sewing and crafting activities. The setup is ideal for use in creative studios, workshops, or home craft rooms.
description: A large wooden sewing workstation with an integrated sewing machine, cutting mat, and multiple storage compartments, designed for crafting and sewing tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main sewing machine, green cutting mat, and organized storage shelves with visible sewing accessories.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the serger on the left extension, additional workspace, and the arrangement of sewing tools and supplies.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the broad work surface, sewing machine, and the extended cutting mat area.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying the open shelving, trays, and the overall L-shaped configuration of the workstation.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A small cluster of buttons and dials is visible on the right side of the sewing machine, arranged in a compact, linear fashion.
attribute_stitch_selector_dial: A round dial with markings is visible on the front right side of the sewing machine, likely serving as the stitch selector.
